enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day in Boulder: dropping off his broken Mac for overnight repair, researching the Race Across America (RAAM) cycling event and planning to attempt it as an unofficial 'shadow racer' doing half the distance, and working on his website's bike race pages. He also mentions listening to an audiobook about American history on his phone and acknowledges wasting time because he was high.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Can't do the full race because he's out of shape; plans to attempt it as a shadow racer at half the distance and double the sleep
Phone is unreliable for long audiobooks due to storage issues; a dedicated MP3 player works better
Self-critical — admits it caused him to waste time and create more work for himself
